highlights: Planned migration from Squarespace to Wix Studio while preserving core church workflows and SEO continuity.
Emphasizes content portability, accessibility compliance, and non-technical editor maintainability.
Treats migration as an operational program (redirects, integrations, forms), not a visual reskin only.
impact: Created a structured migration path that lowers relaunch risk and protects existing traffic/value during platform transition.
one_liner: Website migration and modernization program for CrossPoint Knightdale from Squarespace to Wix Studio.
problem: The existing site required a more maintainable platform and better mobile/editor experience without losing SEO performance.
solution: Designed a phased migration plan covering IA, content transfer, integrations, accessibility, and redirect strategy.
title: CrossPoint Website Migration
visibility_note: Core repository is private. This entry summarizes architecture and working approach without exposing proprietary source.
